name: deep_dive
description: Go deeper on a specific topic for a candidate. Use when the user says 'go deeper', 'tell me more about their donors', 'dig into their voting record', 'what about their campaign finance', or any request for more detail on a specific angle. The app will show a progress animation and then display detailed findings on screen. Returns immediately so you can keep talking.

parameters.description: Go deeper on a specific topic for a candidate. Results appear on screen.

candidate.description: The candidate's full name (e.g. 'Tom Tiffany', 'Chris Taylor', 'Mandela Barnes')

angle.description: The topic to dive deeper on. Examples: 'donors and campaign finance', 'voting record', 'news coverage', 'endorsements', 'policy positions', 'fact checks'
